Saving Throws

Skills

Great Weapon Master

Before a melee attack with a heavy weapon you are proficient with, take -5 to hit for +10 damage. On crit or reducing a creature to 0 HP, make one melee weapon attack as a bonus action.

Great Weapon Fighting

When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack with a two-handed or versatile melee weapon, reroll the die and use the new roll.

Divine Smite

When you hit with a melee weapon attack, expend a spell slot for +2d8 radiant damage, +1d8 per slot level above 1st, +1d8 against fiends/undead.
